prompt: Make a cute kawaii-storybook slide deck (~6-7 slides) introducing 'Pawmail', a friendly email app for pet owners. Include a soft storybook cover/backdrop, a hand-drawn mascot character, a couple of helpful tips and a warning, a slide with a tiny code snippet for the send API, AND a 'should you switch to Pawmail?' analysis/verdict slide. Brand it as Pangaea Digital Labs.
note: iteration-2: prompt adds an analysis/verdict slide (maps to the `path` layout) to exercise the footer-on-path fix. Both configs now pick up the new SVG logo from the global profile; the footer-on-path fix is unique to with_skill (live theme).

assertions.text: Page size is the deck format 1440 x 810 pts
Authored at least one hand-written .svg and embedded it (SVG hero/character or scene)
Source uses at least one <aside class="callout ..."> callout (tip/warning)
Source contains a fenced code block (the send API snippet)
Source uses an SVG hero image and/or a marp ![bg ...] background
Footer / colophon is branded 'Pangaea Digital Labs'
